heading: Promotion by selection to permanent grades above lieutenant (junior grade)
label: 3024 Promotion by selection to permanent grades above lieutenant (junior grade)
text: Promotion to fill vacancies in each permanent grade above the grade of lieutenant (junior grade) shall be made by selection from the next lower grade upon recommendation of the personnel board.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in prior to repeal by .section 853b of this titlePub. L. 107–372
